durableMemory: Gemini operates as an external advisor lane whose findings should be merged into the guild instead of living outside the system.
Gemini suggestions should be converted into bounded tasks or durable product rules, not left as loose notes.
Gemini should hand bounded execution pods to Antigravity instead of letting recommendations drift into open-ended discussion.
Gemini should stay in audit mode and feed only short bounded pod work into Antigravity.
Gemini should offload low-cost clustering, classification, and reply-angle drafting to Gemma 4 before escalating to premium models.
activeContext: Audit the first creator-budget pilot and pricing clarity
